Properties.commandText:
SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[AccessFailedCount], [a0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a0].[Discriminator], [a0].[Email], [a0].[EmailConfirmed], [a0].[LockoutEnabled], [a0].[LockoutEnd], [a0].[NormalizedEmail], [a0].[NormalizedUserName], [a0].[PasswordHash], [a0].[PhoneNumber], [a0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a0].[SecurityStamp], [a0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a0].[UserName], [a0].[AvatarUrl], [a0].[DateOfBirth], [a0].[FirstName], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[JobTitle], [a0].[SecondName], [a0].[SubscriptionType], [r].[UserId], [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ExpiredAt], [r].[RevokedAt], [r].[refreshToken]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(2) [a].[Id], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Discriminator], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [a].[AvatarUrl], [a].[DateOfBirth], [a].[FirstName], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[JobTitle], [a].[SecondName], [a].[SubscriptionType]
    FROM [AspNetUsers] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[Discriminator] = N'ExtendedUser' AND [a].[NormalizedEmail] = @__normalizedEmail_0
) AS [a0]
LEFT JOIN [RefreshTokens] AS [r] ON [a0].[Id] = [r].[UserId]
ORDER BY [a0].[Id], [r].[UserId]

SELECT [a0].[Name]
FROM [AspNetUserRoles] AS [a]
INNER JOIN [AspNetRoles] AS [a0] ON [a].[RoleId] = [a0].[Id]
WHERE [a].[UserId] = @__userId_0

SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[AccessFailedCount], [a0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a0].[Discriminator], [a0].[Email], [a0].[EmailConfirmed], [a0].[LockoutEnabled], [a0].[LockoutEnd], [a0].[NormalizedEmail], [a0].[NormalizedUserName], [a0].[PasswordHash], [a0].[PhoneNumber], [a0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a0].[SecurityStamp], [a0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a0].[UserName], [a0].[AvatarUrl], [a0].[DateOfBirth], [a0].[FirstName], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[JobTitle], [a0].[SecondName], [a0].[SubscriptionType], [r].[UserId], [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ExpiredAt], [r].[RevokedAt], [r].[refreshToken]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Discriminator], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [a].[AvatarUrl], [a].[DateOfBirth], [a].[FirstName], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[JobTitle], [a].[SecondName], [a].[SubscriptionType]
    FROM [AspNetUsers] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[Discriminator] = N'ExtendedUser' AND [a].[NormalizedUserName] = @__normalizedUserName_0
) AS [a0]
LEFT JOIN [RefreshTokens] AS [r] ON [a0].[Id] = [r].[UserId]
ORDER BY [a0].[Id], [r].[UserId]

SELECT [a0].[Id], [a0].[AccessFailedCount], [a0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a0].[Discriminator], [a0].[Email], [a0].[EmailConfirmed], [a0].[LockoutEnabled], [a0].[LockoutEnd], [a0].[NormalizedEmail], [a0].[NormalizedUserName], [a0].[PasswordHash], [a0].[PhoneNumber], [a0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a0].[SecurityStamp], [a0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a0].[UserName], [a0].[AvatarUrl], [a0].[DateOfBirth], [a0].[FirstName], [a0].[IsDeleted], [a0].[JobTitle], [a0].[SecondName], [a0].[SubscriptionType], [r].[UserId], [r].[Id], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ExpiredAt], [r].[RevokedAt], [r].[refreshToken]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(2) [a].[Id], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Discriminator], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [a].[AvatarUrl], [a].[DateOfBirth], [a].[FirstName], [a].[IsDeleted], [a].[JobTitle], [a].[SecondName], [a].[SubscriptionType]
    FROM [AspNetUsers] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[Discriminator] = N'ExtendedUser' AND [a].[NormalizedEmail] = @__normalizedEmail_0
) AS [a0]
LEFT JOIN [RefreshTokens] AS [r] ON [a0].[Id] = [r].[UserId]
ORDER BY [a0].[Id], [r].[UserId]

Properties.commandText:
CREATE TABLE [AspNetRoles] (
    [Id] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Name] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [NormalizedName] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [ConcurrencyStamp] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetRoles] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetRoleClaims] (
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [RoleId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [ClaimType] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [ClaimValue] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetRoleClaims] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetRoleClaims_AspNetRoles_RoleId] FOREIGN KEY ([RoleId]) REFERENCES [AspNetRoles] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetUsers] (
    [Id] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Discriminator] nvarchar(13) NOT NULL,
    [FirstName] nvarchar(20) NULL,
    [SecondName] nvarchar(20) NULL,
    [WorkspaceUsersUserID] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID] int NULL,
    [UserName] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [NormalizedUserName] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [Email] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [NormalizedEmail] nvarchar(256) NULL,
    [EmailConfirmed] bit NOT NULL,
    [PasswordHash] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [SecurityStamp] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [ConcurrencyStamp] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [PhoneNumber] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [PhoneNumberConfirmed] bit NOT NULL,
    [TwoFactorEnabled] bit NOT NULL,
    [LockoutEnd] datetimeoffset NULL,
    [LockoutEnabled] bit NOT NULL,
    [AccessFailedCount] int NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetUsers] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUsers_WorkspaceUsers_WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID_WorkspaceUsersUserID] FOREIGN KEY ([WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID], [WorkspaceUsersUserID]) REFERENCES [WorkspaceUsers] ([WrokSpaceID], [UserID])
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetUserClaims] (
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [UserId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [ClaimType] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [ClaimValue] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetUserClaims] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUserClaims_AspNetUsers_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetUserLogins] (
    [LoginProvider] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [ProviderKey] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [ProviderDisplayName] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [UserId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetUserLogins] PRIMARY KEY ([LoginProvider], [ProviderKey]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUserLogins_AspNetUsers_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetUserRoles] (
    [UserId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [RoleId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetUserRoles] PRIMARY KEY ([UserId], [RoleId]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUserRoles_AspNetRoles_RoleId] FOREIGN KEY ([RoleId]) REFERENCES [AspNetRoles] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUserRoles_AspNetUsers_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [AspNetUserTokens] (
    [UserId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [LoginProvider] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Name] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Value] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_AspNetUserTokens] PRIMARY KEY ([UserId], [LoginProvider], [Name]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_AspNetUserTokens_AspNetUsers_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [RefreshTokens] (
    [UserId] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [refreshToken] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [RevokedAt] datetime2 NULL,
    [ExpiredAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_RefreshTokens] PRIMARY KEY ([UserId], [Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_RefreshTokens_AspNetUsers_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [WorkSpaces] (
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [Name] nvarchar(60) NOT NULL,
    [Description] nvarchar(300) NULL,
    [IconPath] nvarchar(500) NULL,
    [IsActive] bit NOT NULL,
    [WorkspaceUsersUserID] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID] int NULL,
    [CreatedById] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedById] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_WorkSpaces] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_WorkSpaces_AspNetUsers_CreatedById] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_WorkSpaces_AspNetUsers_UpdatedById] FOREIGN KEY ([UpdatedById]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_WorkSpaces_WorkspaceUsers_WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID_WorkspaceUsersUserID] FOREIGN KEY ([WorkspaceUsersWrokSpaceID], [WorkspaceUsersUserID]) REFERENCES [WorkspaceUsers] ([WrokSpaceID], [UserID])
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [RoleNameIndex] ON [AspNetRoles] ([NormalizedName]) WHERE [NormalizedName] IS NOT NULL;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [UserNameIndex] ON [AspNetUsers] ([NormalizedUserName]) WHERE [NormalizedUserName] IS NOT NULL;

CREATE TABLE [Spaces] (
    [Id] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Name] nvarchar(60) NOT NULL,
    [Descreption] nvarchar(300) NULL,
    [IconPath] nvarchar(500) NOT NULL,
    [LastActivity] date NOT NULL,
    [WorkSpaceId] int NOT NULL,
    [IsActive] bit NOT NULL,
    [CreatedById] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedById] nvarchar(450) NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Spaces] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Spaces_AspNetUsers_CreatedById] FOREIGN KEY ([CreatedById]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Spaces_AspNetUsers_UpdatedById] FOREIGN KEY ([UpdatedById]) REFERENCES [AspNetUsers] ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Spaces_WorkSpaces_WorkSpaceId] FOREIGN KEY ([WorkSpaceId]) REFERENCES [WorkSpaces] ([Id]) ON DELETE NO ACTION
);

CREATE TABLE [Tasks] (
    [Id] nvarchar(450) NOT NULL,
    [Name] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [Descreption] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [IsActive] bit NOT NULL,
    [Status] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Tasks] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);
